name: swift-sim-companion
description: Teach Codex to preview Mac-hosted Xcode Simulators and build signed iPhone installs through Swift Sim.

interface.shortDescription: Preview simulators and install iPhone builds.
interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow companion skill that previews a Mac-hosted iOS Simulator session or exports a signed real-device IPA, then returns a native Swift Sim companion link.
defaultPrompt: Open this iOS app in Swift Sim Companion.
Build and hand me a simulator companion link.
Build this app to my iPhone with Swift Sim.
